creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #6)

FYI: I did not do anything relative to the likes of testport
reporting as below:

# poudriere testport -jmain-CA72 sysutils/edk2@macchiatobin
